description:
Turn your voice into polished text.

Ultra-fast AI powered dictation that understands what you want to say and how you want to say it. Instantly turn speech into perfect emails, crisp notes, clear messages, professional communication, and more.
Features
- Parakeet English only model with real-time support added
- Global playback behavior config — set a default that can still be overridden per mode
- Brighter UI throughout the app
- Re-styled keyboard shortcut inputs for a cleaner look
- Removed push-to-talk toggle — clear the shortcut to disable push-to-talk instead
- Sound effects volume control added to settings
- Enhanced audio engine is now the default
- Recording window right-click context menu with Settings and Resize options
- Discard recording confirmation when cancelling recordings longer than 30 seconds
- Alert with shortcut to control panel shown when no audio inputs are available
- Improved activation app indexing performance
- Improved recording error notifications
- Faster initialization
- Faster session cancellation
Fixes
- Fixed recording window freeze on drag bug
- Fixed unclickable expand icon when "Start Recording" is shown
- Fixed stuck key scenarios
- Fixed audio input stream setup with a fallback mechanism
- Fixed recording window system close bug
- Fixed unable to delete pro models after trial expiry
- Added crash handlers for inaccessible config files
- Improved file resampling performance
- HOTFIX: v1.3.3 -> 1.3.4 Onboarding not displaying shortcuts
